data.description:
For Apollo users : You need to create an API key to access the Apollo API. The API key should be included in the header of your API request.
The Create API Keys article details how to create a new key and ensure that it is ready to use.
For Apollo partners : To make API requests on behalf of an Apol…

// This script fixes external links that incorrectly have the dev center URL as the base_url
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  // Find all links that start with /http or /https
  const externalLinks = document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/http"]');
  
  externalLinks.forEach(function(link) {
    // Get the current href
    const currentHref = link.getAttribute('href');
    
    // Remove the leading slash to fix the URL
    const correctedHref = currentHref.substring(1);
    
    // Update the href attribute
    link.href = correctedHref;
    
    // Add click event listener
    link.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      window.open(correctedHref, "_blank");
    });
  });
});

</style><style data-tailwind-stylesheet="true"></style><p><strong>For Apollo users</strong>: You need to create an API key to access the Apollo API. The API key should be included in the header of your API request.</p>
<p>The <a target="_self" href="/docs/create-api-key">Create API Keys</a> article details how to create a new key and ensure that it is ready to use.</p>
<p><strong>For Apollo partners</strong>: To make API requests on behalf of an Apollo user, you need to implement the <a target="_self" href="/docs/use-oauth-20-authorization-flow-to-access-apollo-user-information-partners">OAuth 2.0 authorization flow</a>.</p>
<p>If you'd like to promote an integration you've built to Apollo's APIs, you may <a target="_self" href="/docs/add-your-integration-to-apollos-marketplace">submit an application</a> to have the
